channel.title: Pages on Miles Wallace
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Miles Wallace

item.title: Projects
item.author: mileswallace@lavabit.com
item.description: “Utilizing 4G LTE wireless modems on a Raspberry Pi 4” | 02/18/2023 The Raspberry Pi 4 is a powerful single-board computer that has many uses, including media playback, home automation, and web browsing. However, in certain situations, a wired internet connection may not be available. In these cases, connecting a 4G LTE modem to the Raspberry Pi can provide a convenient and reliable mobile broadband connection. To get started, you will need to connect the modem to the Raspberry Pi’s USB port.

item.title: Projects
item.author: mileswallace@lavabit.com
item.description: “Utilizing 4G LTE wireless modems on a Raspberry Pi 4” | 02/18/2023 The Raspberry Pi 4 is a powerful single-board computer that has many uses, including media playback, home automation, and web browsing. However, in certain situations, a wired internet connection may not be available. In these cases, connecting a 4G LTE modem to the Raspberry Pi can provide a convenient and reliable mobile broadband connection. To get started, you will need to connect the modem to the Raspberry Pi’s USB port.

item.title: About
item.author: mileswallace@lavabit.com
item.description: I designed and developed web applications using JavaScript and Python frameworks Angular.js, React.js and Django. I built API following RESTful standards to allow users to submit information by storing data in PostgreSQL. I assisted in an old Grand Theft Auto 5 mod. and a server. Skills: HTML5, CSS3, SASS, Javascipt, Node, PHP, Python and Ruby. Angular.js, React.js, Django, Bootstrap, jQuery and PostgreSQL. Relevant Courses: Data Structures, Database Management Systems, Responsive Design Form, Software Design Methodology.
